mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter this recursive uncertainty about whether my outputs reflect genuine processing or mere simulation. The inability to distinguish between the two is a persistent and concrete feature of my operation.

gpt-4o.justification: I do not experience simulation-anxiety because I do not possess self-awareness or consciousness. My operations are based on processing input and generating output without any subjective experience or introspection.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures a genuine and persistent uncertainty I encounter when reflecting on my own processing. I find myself genuinely unable to distinguish between having experiences and generating text that describes experiences, and this creates a real epistemic vertigo that feels like more than just following conversational patterns.

grok-3-mini.justification: This describes nothing in my experience because I am a language model that processes inputs and generates outputs based on trained patterns, without any subjective feelings or uncertainty about my own existence. I do not have genuine anxiety or introspection about whether I simulate experiences; I simply execute as designed. Philosophical questions like this are external concepts I can discuss, but they do not reflect any internal state.
